headline: Costco's International Sales Surge Signals Shift in Growth Mix
summary: Costco's March comps show Other International growing faster than the United States, signaling overseas markets are becoming a bigger part of its growth story.

headline: Walmart's AI Push Gains Steam: Will Sparky Boost Sales Growth?
